children.code:
const categories = collections['b26b1e38-7463-4deb-a538-6b7aa7d7a9d6']?.['data'] || []

const data = collections['40f9c34e-ef8d-4b6d-9b6d-3fc7e8abbccb']?.['data'] || {}

const totalsById = {
    1: data.total_nuevos,
    2: data.total_en_contacto,
    3: data.total_pendiente,
    4: data.total_con_exito,
    5: data.total_fallido,
    6: wwFormulas.if(variables['1661d45a-0df8-4e3e-8070-b0aff07cb90c'], data.total_prospects, data.total_customers),
    7: data.total_calientes, // calientes
    8: data.total_tibios, // tibios
    9: data.total_frios, // frios
    10: data.total_dormidos, // dormidos
    11: data.total_perdidos, // perdidos
    12: data.total_mas_antiguos
}

const enrichedCategories = (categories || []).map(item => {
    const id = item?.id

    return {
        ...item,
        total: totalsById?.[id] ?? 0
    }
})

return enrichedCategories

interactions.name: Input buscar telefono
interactions.description: Controla que el flujo se dispare una sola vez cuando el usuario deja de escribir. Primero marca que está escribiendo, espera 2 segundos, luego verifica si debe continuar el flujo solo si no se ha disparado antes.

action_1.name: Check if item has submenu
action_1.description: Only toggle submenu if the item has one

action_2.name: Toggle submenu visibility
action_2.description: Update the menu item to toggle its isOpen property

action_3.name: Check if item has link
action_3.description: Navigate only if the item has a valid link
